# sql-lint

> Static lint for sqlc-style SQL catalogs. Catches duplicate query names, missing semicolons, SELECT *, double-wildcard LIKE, and other cheap-but-easy-to-miss mistakes. Optional sqlfluff integration for full style coverage.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/sql/lint
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/sql/lint
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
